column1: 準備ができ次第、会議を始めましょう。

column3: Let's start the meeting as soon as preparations are complete.
column4: 次第 (as soon as / depending on / according to — multiple uses)
column5: Verb[stem] + 次第 (as soon as) / Noun + 次第 (depending on) / Noun + 次第だ (all depends on)
column6: ① V[stem]+次第 = as soon as V is done, immediately after; ② N+次第 = depends on N, is determined by N
column8: Vたら/と = when/if (general conditional); 次第 = formal immediate sequence or formal dependence; しだいに = gradually (different adverb)
